creator: rhurlin@FreeBSD.org
text:
Thanks for the report. You did not mention, if this happens on amd64 or i386 platform. 


The signal 10 should not happen at least on amd64 and not with the recent version of the port graphics/qgis 2.18.4.

Could you please update your ports tree and then update the port graphics/qgis amd report back, if this helps?

If this not helps, it can be also necessary to rename ~/.qgis2 to ~/.qgis2_BAK and ~/.config/QGIS to ~/.config/QGIS_BAK.
